title: Beldray Easy Empty Electric Lint Remover - Cordless, Rechargeable Fabric Shaver, Remove Bobbles & Pills, 2 Speeds, Includes USB C Cable & Cleaning Brush, Suitable for All Fabrics, Up To 2.5 Hours Use
features: Effectively remove unsightly bobbles and pills from clothes, upholstery, blankets, and more. This fabric shaver works on all fabric types, helping you restore your favourite items to a like-new condition.
Enjoy hassle-free use with a rechargeable battery that provides up to 2.5 hours of continuous use. No cords, no restrictions—just smooth, efficient lint removal wherever you need it.
Choose between 2 speed settings to suit different fabric types. The XL shaving head covers more surface area for faster, more efficient results every time.
This cordless lint remover includes a USB-C charging cable for fast, universal recharging and a cleaning brush to maintain the blade condition keeping it clean for your next use.
The magnetic lint container ensures quick and clean disposal of collected fluff. Simply detach, empty, and click back into place with minimal mess or effort.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Cordless & Rechargeable 2 Suitable For All Fabrics 3 Easy To Empty
